{{Userbox
| border-c = #f00
| border-s = 2
| id-c     = #fcc
| id-s     = 14
| id       = COI
| info-c   = #fee
| info-s   = 8
| info     = This user has a [[WP:COI|conflict of interest]] regarding [[Ben Sigman]] and related topics.
}}

== About me ==
I am Ben Sigman. I edit about myself and topics related to my work — [[XAVIOR (AI operating system)|XAVIOR]], [[Libre (Bitcoin lending platform)|Libre]], [[2718 Capital]], [[mempalace]], ''[[Bitcoin One Million]]'', and ''[[The Big Bitcoin Book]]''.

== Conflict of Interest declaration ==
Per [[WP:AUTOBIO]] and [[WP:COI]], I will:
* Only create new content about myself or my projects via [[Wikipedia:Articles for creation|Articles for Creation]] (AfC)
* Not directly edit live articles about myself or my projects
* Use Talk page [[WP:EDITREQUEST|edit requests]] for any corrections after publication
* Disclose my COI on every article Talk page where I participate

== External profiles ==
* Website: [https://benobi.one benobi.one]
* Wikidata: [[d:Q139266967|Q139266967]]
* GitHub: [https://github.com/bensig bensig]
